game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Long Neck Run** Players control a character automatically running forward on a linear obstacle course, using a swipe left/right or drag control to move horizontally across the path. The core mechanic involves collecting colored rings that match the character's current color to increase its neck length by +1 unit per ring, while collecting rings of the wrong color decreases neck length by -2 units. Progression through the course requires maintaining a minimum neck length to pass specific obstacles like zip lines (e.g., 15 units) or swimming pools (e.g., 10 units), with failure occurring if the neck is too short or the character falls off the path. Successfully completing courses awards keys and gemstones, with the final gemstone yield scaling proportionally to the character's final neck length (e.g., 1 gem per 5 neck units). Collected gemstones are spent in a shop to unlock new cosmetic character skins, such as a rabbit or ninja, offering visual customization. Difficulty scales by increasing the density and complexity of colored ring patterns, introducing more demanding neck-length requirements for obstacles, and increasing the character's base movement speed.
game_info.description: Guide your character through an endless obstacle course, collecting colored rings to grow your neck! Match your character's color to collect rings safely - correct colors add +1 to your neck length, wrong colors cost you -2. Navigate through challenging obstacles like zip lines and pools that require minimum neck lengths to pass. Survive as long as possible while collecting gems to unlock new character skins. The longer your neck, the more gems you earn!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left / Arrow Right: Move character horizontally across the path
Space: Change character color (cycles through available colors)
Enter: Start game from start screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and ring collection mechanics. Validates that the player can move left/right, collect matching rings, and that neck length increases correctly. Also tests that wrong color rings decrease neck length.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move horizontally to collect rings that match the current color. Change color strategically using space when needed. Avoid wrong-colored rings when possible. Maintain a moderate neck length to pass basic obstacles.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully collects multiple rings, neck length increases appropriately, and the character survives for a reasonable duration without hitting game over conditions. Position changes are validated.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal gameplay strategy to maximize survival time and score. Validates that the character can successfully navigate all obstacle types with proper neck length management and color switching.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Implement intelligent pathfinding to collect matching rings while avoiding wrong colors. Proactively manage neck length before obstacles. Switch colors optimally based on upcoming ring patterns. Maintain high neck length for maximum gem collection.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Character survives significantly longer than random play, successfully passes multiple obstacles, achieves high neck length (30+), and collects substantial gems. Demonstrates mastery of all game mechanics.
